adapter_name.title: Name
adapter_name.description: Provide a unique name for this adapter instance. Example: gemini-emb-1

model.title: Model
model.description: Provide the name of the model. The gemini/ prefix will be added automatically if omitted. Recommended: gemini/text-embedding-004

embed_batch_size.title: Embed Batch Size
embed_batch_size.description: Number of texts to embed in a single batch. Leave empty to use the system default.
